youtube_title: Neymar's OUT — Now Brazil's World Cup Is All On Vinícius vs Morocco
youtube_description: With Neymar ruled out (calf) and Rodrygo missing the squad, Vinícius Júnior carries Brazil into their 2026 World Cup opener against Morocco — the first African side to reach a World Cup semifinal. Five-time champions Brazil haven't won it since 2002. Can Vini end 24 years of hurt, or does Morocco spring the upset? #worldcup2026 #brazil #viniciusjr
instagram_caption: Neymar's out. Rodrygo's out. It's all on Vini now. 🇧🇷 Brazil's first test? Morocco — the team that knocked out Spain AND Portugal in 2022. Hero or heartbreak for Vini tonight? Make your case — I'll be in the replies. 🇧🇷 Follow for your daily World Cup story.
tiktok_caption: It's all on Vini now 🇧🇷 Neymar out, Rodrygo out, and Morocco waiting. Hero or heartbreak tonight? Make your case 👀 Follow for daily World Cup stories.
